parameters.name: channames
parameters.label: Channel Names
parameters.description: The names of the channels to keep. Name patterns may be used. Ex:

parameters.name: renamefrom
parameters.label: Rename from
parameters.description: The channel pattern to rename. See .

parameters.name: renameto
parameters.label: Rename to
parameters.description: The replacement pattern for the names. The default parameters do not rename the channels. See .

parameters.name: digits
parameters.label: Digits
parameters.description: Specify the digit at then end of the channel names you want to select when using 'Filter by Digits'

parameters.name: stripdigits
parameters.label: Strip Digits
parameters.description: Then On, the selected channel names are output without the digits. When Off, the selected channel names are not changed.

parameters.name: align
parameters.label: Align
parameters.description: This menu handles cases where multiple input CHOPs have different start or end times. All channels output from a share the same start/end interval, so the inputs must be treated with the Align Options

parameters.name: autoprefix
parameters.label: Automatic Prefix
parameters.description: When 2 channels have the same name, turning on this option will add the node's name (or the node's parent's name, etc.) as a  prefix to the channel name. For example, if selecting a channel from and ,

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page.

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).

examples.label: Reference another CHOP wirelessly
examples.description: Pull channels from noise1 without a wire connection.

examples.label: Select specific channels by name
examples.description: Only pick the tx and tz channels from the source.
